name: drizzle-orm
author: openconsole
notes: Self-contained Drizzle ORM skill for the unified Next.js app scaffold. Uses drizzle-orm/postgres-js + postgres package (not pg/node-postgres), prepare:false so it works for both direct PG :5432 and pgbouncer transaction mode :6432, DATABASE_CASING auto-mapping, _cached.ts + Server Action split for Cache Components integration. Postgres-only — no MySQL/SQLite drift. DATABASE_URL provided by user (scaffold has no docker-compose). Generic Drizzle knowledge lives in references/ for deep dives.
